t_ch: 多谢你，贵客…现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
t_en: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

t_ch: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
t_en: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

t_ch: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
t_en: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏之瞳有四重，前路之阻亦有四重。凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Twilight Iris holds four layers, and so do the trials ahead. Mortals may only glimpse one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color>

t_ch: 天外，又是天外…预言中这些我不理解的词似乎在变多，恐怕只能由贵客想办法解读了。
t_en: Beyond the sky again... The prophecies seem to house many of these cryptic terms I am unable to comprehend. It seems, honored guest, that only you can decipher them.

t_ch: 能多给我点提示吗？
t_en: Can you give me more hints?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏之瞳有四重，前路之阻亦有四重。凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Twilight Iris holds four layers, and so do the trials ahead. Mortals may only glimpse one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color>

t_ch: 天外，又是天外…预言中这些我不理解的词似乎在变多，恐怕只能由贵客想办法解读了。
t_en: Beyond the sky again... The prophecies seem to house many of these cryptic terms I am unable to comprehend. It seems, honored guest, that only you can decipher them.

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_ch: 天空的火种既被夺取，无法预料这里还会发生什么…贵客，请务必小心。
t_en: The Sky Coreflame have been stolen, who knows what may yet befall this place... Honored guest, do take care.

t_ch: 现在，我们能做的只有等待。
t_en: For now, all we can do is wait.

t_ch: 希望我们在新世界还能相遇，贵客。
t_en: May we meet again in the new world, esteemed guest.

t_ch: 贵客，请代我向地上的其他衣匠们问好。
t_en: Honored guest, please send my regards to the other Garmentmakers on the ground.

t_ch: 现在，只有寂静将我包裹……
t_en: Now, only silence wraps around me...

t_ch: 帮我唤回捉过的若虫。
t_en: Help me recall the captured nymphs.

t_ch: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
t_en: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

t_ch: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
t_en: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

t_ch: 如您所愿，我会用金丝将那些您曾触碰过的若虫召回。希望这能为您减少一些负担。
t_en: As you wish, I will summon the nymphs you once touched back with golden threads. I hope this lightens your burden somewhat.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
t_en: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
t_en: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

t_ch: 衣匠运转一百万匹金丝之力，将你触碰过的那几只若虫拽回。
t_en: The Garmentmaker channels the power of a million strands of golden thread to pull back those few nymphs you once touched.

t_ch: 呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
t_en: Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!

t_ch: 这边这边，你看！水面上的倒影，是不是特别可爱？
t_en: Over here, over here, look! The reflection on the water is super cute, isn't it?

t_ch: 嗨，见到你真高兴！是来找人家玩的吗？
t_en: Hi! I'm so happy to see you! Are you here to hang out with me?

t_ch: 好想在软软的麦堆里睡觉，但又舍不得和你在一起的时间，好为难呀。
t_en: I wanna lie down and sleep in a soft pile of wheat so much, but I also don't want to lose a second I could spend with you... This is so hard.

t_ch: 喜欢这样悠闲的时光吗？我很喜欢哦，美好的一天，从见到你开始。
t_en: Do you like relaxing days like this? I love it! Seeing you is the start of a beautiful day.

t_ch: 别心急，我们还有好多好多时间。慢慢来，时光会为我们停下脚步。
t_en: No rush, we've still got all the time in the world. Just take it slow. Time will stop for us.

t_ch: 这朵花送给你！它就像少女的心房，要用心呵护哦。
t_en: This flower's for you! It's just like a girl's heart, so you better take good care of it!

t_ch: 小奇美拉，怎么小小一只呢？快快长大，让我看看你会变得多可爱吧。
t_en: Little Chimera, Little Chimera, why are you so small? Hurry up and grow up, so I can see how cute you'll be!

t_ch: 嗯…哪里去了呢？偷偷躲在哪个小角落里，等着我去找呢？
t_en: Hmm... Now where did it go? Hiding in some corner, waiting for me to come find it?

t_ch: 软乎乎的小海豹，在水池里一摇一摆，嘟嘟的，嘟嘟的…真是可爱到不行~
t_en: Soft and snuggy baby seal, splishing and splashing about, all chubby and pudgy... They're just too cuuute~

t_ch: 好可爱的奇美拉！得给它起个甜甜的名字才行，你有什么主意吗？
t_en: What an adorable chimera! It deserves a really sweet name. Any ideas?

t_ch: 把种子埋进土里，等待它发芽，开出软软的花，就像是在守候一个小小的奇迹。
t_en: Planting a seed in the soil, waiting for it to sprout and its soft flower to bloom... it's like nurturing a tiny miracle.

t_ch: 水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
t_en: Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!

t_ch: 嗯？这么没防备地睡着了…可是会被坏人盯上的，要小心哦。
t_en: Hm? Dozing off like that without a care in the world... Gotta be careful, you might draw attention from the wrong sort of people!

t_ch: 呀，我可以抓紧你吗…大地兽不会突然跑起来，把人家甩出去吧？
t_en: Aah! Can I hold on to you...? The dromas won't suddenly jump up and fling me off, will it?

t_ch: 呼…好累好累。但看着沉甸甸的麦子和你——就好开心！
t_en: Phew... I'm so exhausted! But seeing the heavy ears of wheat and you — that makes me so happy!

t_ch: 瞧！这个稻草人的模样，是不是和你特别像？我可是观察了好久才做出来的。
t_en: Check it out! Doesn't this scarecrow look just like you? I spent ages observing just to get it right!

t_ch: 哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~
t_en: Oh, you like the view here? Then let me get a good look too, so I can remember the places you like~

t_ch: 风车转呀转，转得好慢好慢，仿佛连时间也停下来了呢。
t_en: Round and round the windmill spins, so slow, oh so slow, so slow that it's like even time itself has stopped.

t_ch: 呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
t_en: *yawn*~ I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...

t_ch: 好舒服的风呀，真希望生活每天都能像海面一样平静。
t_en: Wow, the breeze is so pleasant! I wish every day was as peaceful as the surface of the sea.

t_ch: 这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
t_en: This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.

t_ch: 真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！
t_en: That's so fascinating! When you talk about it like that, I wanna go see it for myself! Hehe, but I'll want you to be the guide!

t_ch: 要去秘境探险吗？别害怕，只要我们在一起，就什么都能做到。
t_en: Wanna go explore in the secret realm? No need to be scared. As long as we're together, we can do anything!

t_ch: 来玩猜谜游戏吧！问：人家在想些什么？三二一，回答！
t_en: Let's play a riddle game! What am I thinking? Three, two, one, answer!

t_ch: 风铃叮叮当当，就像是怦怦的心跳，好浪漫呀。
t_en: The wind chimes are ringing, just like heartbeats... It's so romantic.

t_ch: 想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
t_en: A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?

t_ch: 故乡是很让人怀念，可更重要的，是迈出向前的脚步，对吧？
t_en: People always miss their home, but what's more important is to take the next step forward, right?

t_ch: 迷地一口就吃完了。
t_en: Mem gobbled it all in one bite.

t_ch: 该换更大的锅了迷！
t_en: Time to get a bigger pot, memi!

t_ch: 餐馆怎么不营业迷？
t_en: Why isn't the restaurant open, memi?

t_ch: 想吃刺刺球迷！
t_en: I wanna eat some Quillorbs, memi!

t_ch: 采蘑菇？去过了迷。
t_en: Picking mushrooms? Already did that, memi.

t_ch: 摘野果？玩过了迷。
t_en: Picking wild berries? Already did that, memi.

t_ch: 还是继续躺着迷！
t_en: Might as well just keep lying around, memi!

t_ch: 迷迷，好悠闲，好开心~
t_en: Mem, so chill, so happy~

t_ch: 新来的就是天真。
t_en: Newbies are always so starry-eyed.

t_ch: 过阵子就腻了迷！
t_en: You'll get bored in no time, memi!

t_ch: 贵客什么时候到…
t_en: When's our special guest arriving...

t_ch: 好想举办宴会迷…
t_en: I really wanna throw a party, memi...

t_ch: 使劲地拔幼苗…
t_en: Yankin' seedlings with all your might...

t_ch: 是不是就长得更快迷？
t_en: And they'll grow faster that way, memi?

t_ch: 先播种，再松土。
t_en: Plant first, then loosen the soil.

t_ch: 村长是这么教的迷！
t_en: That's what the chief taught us, memi!

t_ch: 徕~哆徕嘻啦~
t_en: La~ do-la-ti-la~

t_ch: 啦咪啦嗦~哆徕嘻~
t_en: La-mi-la-so~ Do-re-ti~

t_ch: 你摸起来好舒服迷！
t_en: You feel so soft, memi!

t_ch: 最近在掉毛迷！
t_en: I've been shedding fur lately, memi...

t_ch: 外面是什么样呢？
t_en: What's the outside world like?

t_ch: 村长不告诉我们迷！
t_en: The chief won't tell us, memi!

t_ch: 该去除草了迷。
t_en: Time for some weeding, memi.

t_ch: 玩会再出发迷！
t_en: One more round of play, then we head out, memi!

t_ch: 迷境外的地方…
t_en: The place beyond the maze...

t_ch: 你还记得迷？
t_en: You still remember, memi?

t_ch: 想秃头也想不出迷！
t_en: No matter how hard I try, I can't figure it out, memi!

t_ch: 跳起来，迷！
t_en: Jump, memi!

t_ch: 注意动作和节拍迷~
t_en: Mind the moves and rhythm, memi~

t_ch: 排练不能被发现迷！
t_en: Keep rehearsals secret, memi!

t_ch: 有、有人过来了迷？
t_en: S—Someone's coming, memi?

t_ch: 新来的客人，欢迎迷！
t_en: Welcome, newcomer memi!

t_ch: …藏哪儿好呢…诶呦，你干嘛，吓我一跳！
t_en: ...Where should I hide... Ah! What the... You scared me!

t_ch: 干什么坏事呢你？
t_en: What sneaky thing are you up to?

t_ch: 才没有！我、你…我只是在为下一次比赛踩点！告诉你，我可是村里的「捉迷藏冠军」，怎么样，厉害吧？
t_en: N—Nothing! I—I was just scoping out the next competition spot! Just so you know, I'm the hide-and-seek champion of this village! Pretty awesome, huh?

t_ch: 原来是这样。
t_en: So that's how it is.

t_ch: 就、就是这样！我没有说大话！
t_en: Y—Yeah, that's right! Not bragging here!

t_ch: （盯着他不说话）
t_en: (Stare at him without saying anything)

t_ch: …你、你怎么这么吓人！好吧，跟你说实话还不行吗——我爹要揍我，我出来避避风头。就这么简单，满意了吗？
t_en: ...Wh—Why are you being so scary!? Fine, I'll come clean. My dad's gonna whup me at the moment, so I came out for a shelter. That's it. Happy now?

t_ch: 所以你还有什么事吗？没看我现在忙着么……
t_en: So... did you need something? Can't you see I'm busy?

t_ch: 能和我说说白厄吗？
t_en: Can you tell me about Phainon?

t_ch: 咦…你俩整天形影不离的，现在反倒来问我？哼哼，果然——村里和白厄哥关系最好的，还得是我！
t_en: Huh? You two are glued together most days, and now you're asking me? Heh! Knew it — no one in this village is tighter with Mr. Phainon than me!

t_ch: 偷偷告诉你，白厄哥可是注定要成为大英雄的人！这可是「神谕牌」说的，是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的旨意呢！
t_en: Let me tell you a secret: Mr. Phainon's destined to be a great hero! This is from the oracle cards. It's the will of {RUBY_B#the Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 等我长大了，练好了怎么挥剑、怎么搭弓，就去外面找白厄哥，也做个小英雄！
t_en: Once I'm grown and master swordplay and archery, I'm heading out to find Mr. Phainon. I wanna be a little hero, too!

t_ch: 咳、当然啦，如果莉维娅那丫头非得求着我带她一起，也不是不可以考虑……
t_en: Ahem, well, maybe if Livia begs me to bring her along, I might consider it...

t_ch: 加油，祝你好运。
t_en: You can do it. Good luck.

t_ch: 好嘞，借你吉言！老爹这次绝对找不着我！
t_en: Thanks! I'll take all the luck I can get! No way dad's finding me this time!

t_ch: 白厄哥！这边——嘘，小点声……
t_en: Mr. Phainon! Over here — shhh, keep it down...

t_ch: 你又闯什么祸了？
t_en: What trouble have you gotten yourself into this time?

t_ch: 这次真不是我的问题！最近老爹不是快过生日了吗，我寻思给他整块皮子做个护手，这几天就没少往林子里跑。
t_en: This one really wasn't my fault! As my dad's birthday's coming up, I thought I'd make him some gloves outta leather, so I've been out in the woods a lot lately.

t_ch: 结果…结果因为稍微旷了那么几节课，皮西厄斯老师找上门了……
t_en: But... but I skipped a few classes to do it, and now Miss Pythias is on my tail...

t_ch: 直接和你老爹说不就行了吗？
t_en: Couldn't you just explain everything to your dad?

t_ch: 那可不行！说了不就一点儿惊喜都没了吗！要是没法让他边震惊边夸奖我，这些天的努力可就白费了！
t_en: No way! That'd spoil the fun! If I can't get him shocked and impressed at the same time, all this effort will go to waste!

t_ch: 再说了…你看他像是会听我解释的样子吗，哪次不是二话不说，先拎着藤条给我一顿抽……
t_en: And besides... does he look like someone who listens to explanations? Every time it's the same thing — no questions, just the cane!

t_ch: 稍微？几节？
t_en: A few classes, huh?

t_ch: 别、别在意那种细节啦！我这次又不是为了出去玩才旷课……
t_en: D—Don't sweat the details! It's not like I skipped class just to goof off this time...

t_ch: 先说好，白厄哥，你可别卖我啊，不然这次，我屁股铁定得开花。
t_en: But promise me, Mr. Phainon, you won't rat me out, okay? Or my behind's really gonna be toast.

t_ch: 要是之后我老爹问起来，你就说我在谷仓那边，反正我平时都往那躲。
t_en: If my dad asks, just say I'm by the granary. That's where I usually hide anyway.

t_ch: 等我离开村庄后…
t_en: Once I leave the village...

t_ch: 行了行了，别念啦——都这么多回了，我还能不知道你要说什么嘛。
t_en: Alright, alright, I get it already — you've said it a million times. I know what's coming.

t_ch: 听老爹的话、好好练射箭、不许挑食、不许旷课、不许欺负莉维娅…还有什么遗漏的吗？
t_en: Listen to dad, practice archery, no picky eating, no skipping class, no bullying Livia... Did I miss anything?

t_ch: 你记得倒是很清楚嘛。
t_en: You've got a good memory, I'll give you that.

t_ch: 那必须的！皮西厄斯老师要是有你这么能念叨，我的成绩肯定特别好。
t_en: Of course! If Professor Pythias nagged like you do, I'd probably be top of the class.

t_ch: 光记住没用，要做到才行。
t_en: Remembering it isn't enough. You gotta do it.

t_ch: 别的都好说，最后那条纯属冤枉——那丫头可凶了，谁敢欺负她啊！
t_en: Everything except that last one is fine. That girl's fierce. I mean, who'd even dare to bully her?

t_ch: 总之，放心吧白厄哥，我可是你的头号小弟。就算你出去闯荡了，我也能把村子里的小崽子们治得服服帖帖。
t_en: Anyway, don't worry, Mr. Phainon. I'm your number one follower. Even if you leave to explore the world, I'll keep all the brats here in line.

t_ch: 等哪天，你们成了大英雄，我和莉维娅就去投奔你们。要给我讲你们在其他城邦的冒险故事，带我吃好多好吃的！
t_en: And when you two become legendary heroes, Livia and I will come join you. You've gotta tell us all about your adventures and feed us tons of delicious stuff!

t_ch: 说好了啊，可不许忘了！
t_en: It's a deal. Don't you dare forget!

t_ch: 我先去忙了。
t_en: I've got stuff to take care of. See ya.

t_ch: 好嘞，我得先想办法把自己藏好…回见！
t_en: Got it. I need to find a better hiding spot anyway... Catch you later!

t_ch: 呦，这不是和白厄一起的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}吗，难得见你自个儿在外边晃悠。
t_en: Well, well, isn't this the {F#young lady}{M#young lad} who's always with Phainon? Rare to see you wandering around alone.

t_ch: 来，尝尝我今早刚熏的肉干——涂了野蜂蜜，香得很，年轻人应该都喜欢。
t_en: Here, try some smoked meat I made this morning — coated it with wild honey. Smells amazing, perfect for young folks like you.

t_ch: 好吃！还有吗？
t_en: This is delicious! You got more?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，有的有的，你想吃多少就吃多少。
t_en: Hahaha, you bet! You can eat as much as you want.

t_ch: 这是我上周猎的鹿，肉质特别好，炖完之后又香又嫩，可惜你没赶上口新鲜的……
t_en: This is from a deer I bagged last week — real tender meat. Would've been even better fresh out of the pot... too bad you missed it.

t_ch: 回头有机会让你尝尝我炸的鱼吧，保准是你没见识过的独家手艺。
t_en: Next time, I'll let you try my fried fish. Bet you've never tasted anything like it!

t_ch: 你知道白厄小时候什么样吗？
t_en: Do you remember what Phainon was like as a kid?

t_ch: 哈，瞧这话说的，他现在不也还没长大呢吗。不过…要说他小时候，和我家兔崽子其实还挺像的。
t_en: Haha, come on now. He's still pretty much a kid, isn't he? But yeah... when he was younger, he was a lot like my little rascal at home.

t_ch: 男孩子嘛，就这样，哪个不是满脑子英雄故事，天天想着拯救世界。别看他现在一本正经的，小时候可喜欢拎着树枝在麦田里打滚……
t_en: Boys are all the same — heads full of hero stories, always dreaming of saving the world. Don't let his serious face fool you. He used to roll around the wheat fields with a branch...

t_ch: 对了，你要是想学怎么逮田鼠，可以找他教你。那小子技术可好了。
t_en: By the way, if you wanna learn how to catch field mice, he's the one to ask. That kid's got real skills.

t_ch: 我还有事，先走啦。
t_en: I've got to do something else. Gotta get moving first.

t_ch: 好，有空记得再来玩。
t_en: Sure. Come by again when you've got time.

t_ch: 白厄，你来得正好，看到披索了吗？
t_en: Phainon! Good timing. Have you seen Piso around?

t_ch: 这是什么种子？
t_en: What kind of seeds are these?

t_ch: 一种粉百合，之前打猎的时候在林子里见过，昔涟听说了，就拜托我给她带些回来。
t_en: Pink lilies. Spotted them while hunting in the woods. Cyrene heard about it and asked me to bring some back for her.

t_ch: 唉，小姑娘总是那么客气，不就是顺手的差事，还特意烤了面包送来当谢礼。
t_en: She's always so polite. It's just a small favor, but she even baked me bread to say thanks.

t_ch: 差点忘了，我还晒了树莓干，你拿点，也给她带过去些吧。
t_en: Right, almost forgot. I've got some sun-dried raspberries too. Take some and give them to her as well.

t_ch: 披索又惹你生气了？
t_en: Did Piso tick you off again?

t_ch: 可不是！老师都找到家里来了，说这小兔崽子最近老是旷课。
t_en: You bet! His teacher came knocking, said the little rascal's been skipping class lately.

t_ch: 我本来要找他好好说道说道，但那小子今天一大早就不见人，准是知道我要揍他，提前躲出去了。
t_en: I was about to have a real talk with him, but to my surprise, he vanished first thing this morning. Must've known what was coming and ran off early.

t_ch: 他也许在谷仓那边…
t_en: He might be over by the granary...

t_ch: 行，我过会就去把他逮回来，谢了啊。
t_en: Got it. I'll go drag him back in a bit. Thanks for the heads-up.

t_ch: 我今天还没见过他。
t_en: I haven't seen him today.

t_ch: 没事，我自己再四处找找，反正今天不进林子…哼，我还能治不了他？
t_en: No problem. I'll keep looking. Not heading into the woods today anyway... Hmph, he thinks he can outrun me?

t_ch: 唉，那个小混蛋，但凡能有你一半省心就好了……
t_en: *sigh* That little scamp... If only he were half as easy to deal with as you...

t_ch: 关于这次出行…
t_en: About the upcoming trip...

t_ch: 决定好什么时候出发了吗？我之前顺手逮了几只肥兔子，已经腌好晾上了，走之前记得来拿。
t_en: You guys set a date to head out yet? I caught some fat rabbits the other day, and they're all cured and ready. Make sure you swing by to grab them before you leave.

t_ch: 我…其实还没下定决心…
t_en: I... I haven't made up my mind yet...

t_ch: 没事，我懂。没想好就慢慢想，反正也不急着赶这一天两天的。
t_en: No worries. I get it. Take your time. No need to rush it.

t_ch: 但我觉得吧…外面的世界挺大的，去看看也好。你瞧，我打了一辈子的猎，但恐怕网子里的鸟到过的地方都比我多。
t_en: But if you had to ask... it's a big world out there. Worth seeing a bit of it. I've hunted all my life, but I bet the birds caught in my snares have seen more than I ever will.

t_ch: 估计就在最近了。
t_en: It'll probably be soon.

t_ch: 哈哈，好，等日子定了就告诉我，我去渡口给你们送行。
t_en: Haha, alright. Once you've picked a day, let me know. I'll walk you to the ferry myself.

t_ch: 要我说啊，年轻人该多出去闯荡闯荡，肯定怎么都比一直窝在这里强。
t_en: If you ask me, I'd say young folks should go out there and see the world themselves. It's gotta be better than staying stuck here forever.

t_ch: 等倦了、累了，就往回走——村里的炊烟啊，总是比艾格勒醒得都早。
t_en: And when you get tired, just come home. The smoke in the village always rises earlier than Aquila.

t_ch: 我先走了，回见。
t_en: I'm heading off. See you later.

t_ch: 去吧去吧，我待会也要去找那臭小子了。
t_en: Go on then. I've got a certain brat to hunt down myself.

t_ch: 噢，是你啊。难得村子里来了个客人——不错吧，这片田？
t_en: Oh? It's you. Not every day a guest shows up in this village — Nice field, huh?

t_ch: 都是你种的麦子吗？
t_en: Did you plant all this wheat yourself?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，怎么可能！这么大一片，要全让我打理，准得累垮了。
t_en: Hahaha, not a chance! A field this size? If I had to tend it solo, I'd collapse from exhaustion.

t_ch: 很漂亮的麦田。
t_en: It's a beautiful wheat field.

t_ch: 是吧！今年长势好得很，瞧这颜色，不比{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的裙子漂亮？
t_en: I know, right? The crop's looking fantastic this year. Look at that golden hue, doesn't it outshine {RUBY_B#Romantic Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s dress?

t_ch: 来了都是自家人，别见外。这么好的天气，回头等咱家葡萄酿好了，记得和我家孩子一起去麦田里坐坐，晒晒太阳，吹吹风…不是我吹牛，那感觉舒服得很呢！
t_en: You're one of us now, no need to be shy. With such fine weather, once our grapes have fermented, be sure to take my kids out to the wheat fields. Sit in the sun, feel the breeze... I'm not bragging, it feels great.

t_ch: 白厄，你小子！可算回来了。放着农活不干，跑哪儿去了？
t_en: Phainon, you brat! You're finally back. Skipping out on chores again, where did you go?

t_ch: 我…哈哈，刚才在库房呢。
t_en: Me? Haha, I was just out back in the warehouse.

t_ch: 哎…又摆弄你那些个黄金战争时期出土的宝贝呢。实话说了吧，就你那爱不释手的小瓦罐，我估计多半是披索他爷爷当年用过的腌菜坛。
t_en: Hah... Messing with those ancient treasures from the Chrysos War again, weren't you? Be honest, that little clay jar you're so obsessed with? I'd bet it's just Piso's granddad's old pickle crock.

t_ch: 先不争这个，老爸。我只是想说……
t_en: Let's not argue over that now, Dad. What I wanted to say is...

t_ch: 行李…我收拾好了。
t_en: I've... packed my bags.
Oh...

t_ch: 哈，你不说我都忘了！臭小子，手脚麻利，就说随我，你妈还不信……
t_en: Ha! I almost forgot! Kid, you're quick on your feet, just like me. Your mom still doesn't believe it...

t_ch: …什么时候出发？我和你妈去送你。
t_en: ...When are you leaving? Your mother and I will see you off.

t_ch: 后天{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}。你就别送了，大清早的，田里的活忙也忙不完。
t_en: At the {RUBY_B#morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} of the day after tomorrow, you don't have to send me off. It's too early, and the field work never ends.

t_ch: 我一个人能行，放心吧。
t_en: I'll be fine on my own. Really.

t_ch: 行吧，听你的。臭小子，那会儿连个锄头都举不起来，一转眼就要去悬锋城学剑了……
t_en: Alright, have it your way. Kid, not long ago you couldn't even lift a hoe, and now you're off to Castrum Kremnos to train with a sword...

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭要是没了这片麦田…都不知道要怎么数季节呢。
t_en: If Aedes Elysiae ever loses this wheat field... I don't even know how we'd keep track of the seasons.

t_ch: 哈哈…我恐怕很长时间都没法帮你和老妈收麦子了啊。
t_en: Haha... I'm afraid I won't be around to help you and Mom harvest for a long while.

t_ch: 瞎操心。我俩身体结实得很，就算少了你，咱这个家日子还是照样过……
t_en: Don't worry about it. Your mother and I are still strong as a pair of oxen. Even without you, we'll keep this household running just fine...

t_ch: 好好学武艺，别想那些有的没的。就算当不了神话里的救世主，守不住这个世界所有人，你也得回来守好咱这座小村庄啊。
t_en: Focus on your swordsmanship. Don't get lost in idle thoughts. Even if you never become the Deliverer they sing about in legends or can't protect the whole world, you still need to come back and protect this little village of ours.

t_ch: 哈…都说多少次了，我才当不了救世主呢。
t_en: Hah... How many times do I have to say it? I'm not cut out to be some Deliverer.

t_ch: 哎呀，你是白厄的朋友吧？欢迎欢迎。不好意思，我刚从田里出来，身上有点脏……
t_en: Oh? You're a friend of Phainon? Welcome, welcome! Sorry, I just came in from the fields and got a bit messy...

t_ch: 最近的农作很忙吗？
t_en: Have you been busy with the fields?

t_ch: 呵呵，还好。耕耘月和收获月是最要出力的时候，其他时间谈不上太忙。
t_en: Hehe, not too bad. The Month of Cultivation and Month of Reaping are the toughest, but the rest of the time's pretty manageable.

t_ch: 劳动是件快乐的事啊。
t_en: Hard work's a kind of joy, isn't it?

t_ch: 呵呵，是呀。看到那些茁壮生长的麦子，金灿灿的…任谁都会开心哪。
t_en: Hehe, it surely is. Seeing the wheat grow tall and golden... it just makes me smile, you know?

t_ch: 喔，你瞧我，光顾着聊天都忘招待你了。
t_en: Ah! Look at me — got so caught up chatting I forgot my manners!

t_ch: 来，就当自己家吧。等我家孩子回来，给你们尝尝我最拿手的蜂蜜烙饼，还有最近刚熏的肉！
t_en: Come on in, make yourself at home. Once my kid's back, I'll have you all try my best honey suncake, and the smoked meat I just finished curing!

t_ch: 哟，老妈。我回来了。
t_en: Hey, mom. I'm home.

t_ch: 呵呵，看你这表情…行李收拾好了？
t_en: Hehe, look at your expression... got your bags all packed?

t_ch: 还真是什么都瞒不过你…嗯，收拾好了，后天出发。
t_en: Can't hide anything from you, huh... Yeah, I'm all set. Heading out the day after tomorrow.

t_ch: 谁叫你是我的好孩子呢。从小到大，你想做什么，抬抬手我就知道啦。
t_en: You've always been easy to read, my sweet child. Since you were little, I just had to glance your way to know what's on your mind.

t_ch: 你之前说…是要去悬锋城，对吧？不知道那里离咱们的哀丽秘榭有多远？
t_en: You said... you're going to Castrum Kremnos, right? I wonder how far that is from our Aedes Elysiae?

t_ch: 哈哈，我也不知道。听说悬锋城像大地兽一样，会慢慢到处走动呢。
t_en: Haha, no clue. I heard that Castrum Kremnos roams around slowly, just like a dromas.

t_ch: 别担心，老妈，等学成我就回来了。而且，悬锋城搞不好走着走着，哪天还能路过咱们这儿呢。
t_en: Don't worry, mom. Once I finish my studies, I'll come straight home. Who knows? Maybe one day that city will wander right past our village.

t_ch: 呵呵，那妈可要时不时到谷堆上看看，有没有像山一样的大地兽来哀丽秘榭附近了。
t_en: Then I'll have to keep watch from the haystack. Just to see if a mountain-sized dromas is headed for Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 到时候，我和你爸就在家里开锅，备上好吃的等着。你看到麦浪和炊烟，就知道家在哪儿啦。
t_en: When that day comes, your dad and I will fire up the stove, get a feast ready. You'll see the golden fields, the kitchen smoke curling — and know you're home.

t_ch: 哈，就算没有炊烟，我也能找到家在哪儿。除了老爸，应该没人比我更熟悉这片麦田了。
t_en: Hah, even without the smoke, I'll always know where home is. I know these wheat fields better than anyone — except dad, maybe.

t_ch: 等我回来…我想吃蜂蜜烙饼，配熏鹿肉和橄榄汁！
t_en: When I get back... I want honey suncake, with smoked venison and olive juice!

t_ch: 就知道你想吃这个。要是交了朋友，也别忘了领回家看看，咱们和村里人一定摆场宴会，好好招待。
t_en: Knew you'd say that. And if you make any friends, bring them home. The whole village will throw a proper feast to welcome them.

t_ch: 没问题！真不知道在外面能见识到什么样的人呢。
t_en: You got it! I can't help wondering the people I'll meet out there.

t_ch: 呵呵…妈相信你，一定会有许多真诚善良的人和你一起同行。
t_en: Hehe... I believe in you. You'll definitely find kind, sincere people to walk beside you.

t_ch: 记得：你也一定要用真心对待他们，别让他们难过、失望哪。
t_en: Just remember to treat them with the same kindness. Never let their hearts go cold or hopes turn sour, okay?
Ah...

t_ch: 不会的，妈。我一定不会让大家失望…也不会让你和老爸失望。
t_en: I won't, mom. I won't let anyone down... not them, not you, and not Dad.

t_ch: 啊，你是白厄的朋友吧，欢迎。
t_en: Ah, you must be a friend of Phainon's. Welcome!

t_ch: 不巧，现在正是农忙的时候，学校不开课，不然还想让你给孩子们讲讲外面的事呢。
t_en: Not the best timing, though. It's a busy season in the fields right now, and the school's on break. Otherwise, I'd have loved for you to tell the kids a bit about the outside world.

t_ch: 我对村子里的学校有些好奇…
t_en: I'm actually curious about that village school...

t_ch: 这里吗？那我来介绍下吧。我把村里的所有孩子按照年龄分成了三个班，每个班上课的时间，教的课程都各不相同。
t_en: Oh? Then let me give you a quick tour. I've divided all the village kids into three classes by age. Each group has different lessons and schedules.

t_ch: 小班教算术、几何和品德，中班教地理和祭祷仪式，大班的话，就是让孩子们钻研自己喜欢的东西了，老师只会作为引导。
t_en: The little ones learn arithmetic, geometry, and morals. The middle group studies geography and our prayer ceremonies. As for the oldest, they're free to explore what interests them. Teachers just guide them along the way.

t_ch: 听起来很轻松对吧？都是些基础课程，毕竟，孩子们再长大点就得去帮父母务农了，用不上那些复杂的知识。
t_en: Sounds pretty relaxed, doesn't it? Just the basics. After all, once they grow a little older, they'll be helping their parents in the fields. So, no need for complicated knowledge.

t_ch: 不过，我还是希望他们有天能走出村子，去外面的世界看看啊。
t_en: Still... I do hope that one day, they will step beyond the village and see the world for themselves.

t_ch: 孩子们最近怎么样？
t_en: How are the kids doing lately?

t_ch: 还是老样子，一刻不抓，上房揭瓦。就连我最近没收的小玩具，也比白厄那个时候花样多多了——
t_en: Same as always — turn your back, and they're climbing the curtains. Even the toys I've confiscated lately are way more creative than in Phainon's time.

t_ch: 你能想象吗？虽说只有个外形，但有的孩子已经能拿木头削个小木马出来了。哈哈，说不定很有当雅努斯祭司的潜质呢。
t_en: Can you believe it? Though it's just a rough shape, some kids can already carve little wooden horses by hand. Hah, maybe we have some future priests of Janus in the making!

t_ch: 下次有空再聊吧！
t_en: Let's catch up again when there's more time.

t_ch: 好呀，像你这样见识丰富的贵客，孩子们一定会欢迎的。
t_en: Gladly! I'm sure the kids would love meeting someone with your experience and stories.

t_ch: 白厄，你曾说打算离开哀丽秘榭，去外面的广阔天地远行，准备做得怎么样了？
t_en: Phainon, you once said you wanted to leave Aedes Elysiae and explore the wider world. How's that going?

t_ch: 我都安排好了。
t_en: Everything's ready now.

t_ch: 嗯，那就好。村子里的生活总是很平静，但到了外面，还是得多留个心眼。
t_en: Good to hear. Life here is quiet, but out there... you'll need to stay sharp.

t_ch: 还有点没想好…
t_en: There are still a few things I haven't figured out...

t_ch: 呵呵，你从前就是个心思细密的孩子，总是考虑得很多。
t_en: Hehe, ever since childhood, you've always had a careful mind — always planning ahead.

t_ch: 没关系，就算决定不离开也无所谓，我都会支持你的想法。冒险能增长见识，但留下来过平稳的生活也是种选择。
t_en: But it's okay. Even if you decide to stay, I'll still support you. There's value in adventure, yes — but living a quiet, steady life is also a choice worth making.

t_ch: 总之，别给自己太大压力，按心里的想法前进就好。
t_en: Just don't pressure yourself. Whatever you choose, as long as it's what your heart tells you... that's enough.

t_ch: 至于你拜托我收集的关于树庭的信息，现在倒是有些眉目了。
t_en: As for the info of the Grove you asked me to look into, I've managed to dig up a few leads.

t_ch: 虽然老师没去过，但听说，树庭各学派的贤人都是极其卓越的智者，学识渊博，技艺超群。若是你能师从其中一位继续深造，肯定会大有收获吧。
t_en: Though I've never been there myself, they say the sages of its various schools are all brilliant minds — learned, skilled, and deeply respected. Studying under one of them would surely take you far.

t_ch: 这么说…倒确实想去看看了。
t_en: In that case... I've gotta see this myself.

t_ch: 待我学成归来吧！
t_en: Just wait till I come back a master!

t_ch: 呵呵，有志气当然是好事。不过…我还听说，神悟树庭崇尚辩论与独立思考，学术风气极为自由，各种惊世骇俗的理论层出不穷。
t_en: Hehe, that's the spirit. But... I've also heard the Grove of Epiphany places great value on open debate and independent thinking. The academic scene is extremely free — so much so that bizarre and radical theories pop up all the time.

t_ch: 你要是真去了。求学时，还是得擦亮眼睛，仔细分辨为好。
t_en: If you really plan to go, you'll need to keep your eyes sharp. Learn what you can, but be careful to discern what's what.

t_ch: 我会记得的。
t_en: I'll keep that in mind.

t_ch: 嗯，听我唠叨这么久，你也该烦了。去忙自己的事吧。
t_en: Well, I've rambled enough — you must've had your fill. Off with you now.

t_ch: 刚刚那只蝴蝶去哪了…咦，我认得你，你是白厄哥哥的好朋友！
t_en: Where did that butterfly go... Oh, I know you! You're Phainon's friend!

t_ch: 你是在捉蝴蝶吗？
t_en: Are you chasing butterflies?

t_ch: 不是捉，只是在观察！那是只翅膀带星斑的银翅蝶，可好看了……
t_en: Not chasing. I'm just observing! That one was a Silverwing Butterfly, the kind with little star-shaped spots on its wings. So pretty...

t_ch: 对了，你喜欢蝴蝶吗？莉维娅认识好多漂亮的蝴蝶哦，也知道它们住在哪里。
t_en: Do you like butterflies? I know lots of beautiful ones! I even know where they live.

t_ch: 我可以带你一起去看——只要你愿意和莉维娅成为好朋友的话！
t_en: I can take you to see them — if you promise to be my friend!

t_ch: 能和我说说白厄吗？
t_en: Can you tell me about Phainon?

t_ch: 白厄哥哥啊…他又温柔、考试成绩又好、做事又可靠，村子里的大家都喜欢他。
t_en: Phainon? He's super gentle, always gets good grades, and you can count on him for anything. Everyone in the village likes him.

t_ch: 不过…悄悄告诉你，我还是更喜欢昔涟姐姐一点。
t_en: Buuut... between you and me, I like Cyrene just a tiny bit more.

t_ch: 等我长大了，要像昔涟姐姐那样，变成一个又独立又强大的女孩子，然后去看看外面的世界！
t_en: When I grow up, I want to be just like her — strong, smart, and independent. Then I'll go out and see the world for myself!

t_ch: 我还有事，回见。
t_en: I've got to run. See you around.

t_ch: 再见。有空的话，记得来找莉维娅一起去看蝴蝶哦。
t_en: Bye-bye! Come find me anytime if you want to go see butterflies together!

t_ch: 白厄哥哥！我为你准备了临别礼物哦，开心吗？
t_en: Phainon! I prepared a farewell gift for you. Aren't you happy?

t_ch: 她肯定喜欢。
t_en: She'll love it, I'm sure.

t_ch: 太好啦，我可是翻了好些绘本，才在《小妖精历险记》的插图里找到了这款！
t_en: Yay! I had to flip through so many picture books before I found the perfect one in The Tiny Fairy's Adventure!

t_ch: 说好了，这是我们之间的小秘密，你可别提前告诉她哦！
t_en: Pinky promise! It's our super-duper secret. Don't spoil the surprise!

t_ch: 是什么礼物？
t_en: What kind of gift?

t_ch: 哼哼，现在还不能让你知道，不然就没有惊喜啦。
t_en: Heh heh, I can't show it to you yet, or it won't be a surprise.

t_ch: 不过…作为补偿，我可以偷偷告诉你，笨蛋披索也给你准备礼物了哦。只是他脸皮很薄，不好意思说出来！
t_en: Buuut... to make up for it, I can tell you a little secret — that dummy Piso also prepared something for you! He's just way too shy to say anything.

t_ch: 以后要照顾好自己。
t_en: Take care of yourself, alright?

t_ch: 嗯，我知道！莉维娅会认真读书，学好多好多的知识。
t_en: I will! Livia's going to study hard and learn lots and lots of things!

t_ch: 然后，等我长成大孩子，就带笨蛋披索一起冒险、拯救世界！
t_en: Then, when I'm a big kid, I'll drag that dummy Piso with me, and we'll go on adventures and save the world together!

t_ch: 白厄哥哥，你说…还要过多久，我们才能变得像你一样厉害呢？
t_en: Hey, Phainon... how much longer do you think it'll take for us to be as amazing as you?

t_ch: 别急，很快的。
t_en: Don't worry. It won't be long.

t_ch: 好想赶快长大啊…呜，哀丽秘榭的日子，为什么就不能过得更快些呢？
t_en: How I wish I could grow up faster... Why do the days in Aedes Elysiae have to go by so sloooow...

t_ch: 长大也不一定是好事。
t_en: Growing up isn't always a good thing.

t_ch: 我知道啦。但是，我也想去外面冒险，去遇见好多好多有意思的事。呜……
t_en: I know. But I still wanna go outside, and see all sorts of exciting things. Agh...

t_ch: 哆徕咪，咪徕哆~
t_en: Do re mi, mi re do~

t_ch: 妖精迷路采花蜜，寻寻觅觅穿林径~
t_en: Fairies wander, nectar sweet, tiptoe past the clover sheets~

t_ch: 村长眯起老花眼，树荫底下笑眯眯~
t_en: Village chief, blinks and winks, smiling under shady trees~

t_ch: 是、是谁在呼救迷？！
t_en: Wh—Who's calling for help, mem!?

t_ch: 呼，原来只是虚惊一场。
t_en: ...Whew, guess it's just a false alarm.

t_ch: 在我巡逻的日子里，不允许任何事故发生！
t_en: Nothing's allowed to go wrong on my patrol!

t_ch: 这个音符是棕黄色的，像故事里说的秋收的田野。
t_en: This note is brownish-gold, like an autumn harvest field in the tales.

t_ch: 阳光晒着懒洋洋的麦穗，风吹过送来香甜的气息……
t_en: Lazy wheat swaying under the sun, a breeze carrying the sweet smell...

t_ch: 总有一天，迷境里也会有这样的麦田吧？
t_en: Maybe one day, the maze will have fields like that too?

t_ch: 这个声音，好像在吸溜白白芋面迷。
t_en: That sound... it's like someone slurping creamy taro noodles, mem.

t_ch: 真想把面条嗦个不停，一直到肚子撑得鼓鼓的迷。
t_en: How I want to slurp and slurp until my belly's all full and round, mem.

t_ch: 你有没有觉得，「啦」这个音圆滚滚的？
t_en: Don't you think the note "la" sounds round and bouncy?

t_ch: 好像大家一起手拉着手转圈圈，我最喜欢了迷~
t_en: Just like everyone holding hands and spinning in circles. I love that, mem~

t_ch: 咦，没有见过你！
t_en: Oh? I haven't seen you before.

t_ch: 我和大家约好了去草地里追蝴蝶，风铃一响就出发。
t_en: We've all promised to chase butterflies in the meadow today. Once the wind chime rings, we're off.

t_ch: 你要是有心情，也可以和我们一起迷。
t_en: If you feel up to it, come along with us, mem!

t_ch: 迷！今天在熬汤的时候睡着了，被村长揪住教训了半天。
t_en: Mem! The chief caught me dozing off while cooking the soup today. I got a big lecture this time.

t_ch: 但是一听到这个音，就感觉心里暖洋洋的，心情好多了迷。
t_en: But when I hear this note, it feels all warm and cozy inside. And suddenly, everything's better again, mem!

t_ch: 不要敲了迷！这个点正是大家打盹的时候。
t_en: Stop ringing that, mem! This is prime nap time for everyone.

t_ch: 我刚梦见田地里的藤蔓长成了参天大树，到处挂满了白色的小花，风里都是甜甜的香气，怎么闻也闻不够。
t_en: I just dreamt the vines in the fields had grown into towering trees, covered in little white blossoms. Even the breeze smelled so sweet... I could've sniffed it forever.

t_ch: 我要回去继续睡，把这个梦做完迷！
t_en: I'm going back to sleep and finishing that dream, mem!

t_ch: 「哆」是最稳重的音符，无论其他音符多顽皮，它都永远不会改变迷。
t_en: "Do" is the steadiest of all notes. No matter how playful the other notes get, it'll never change, mem.

t_ch: 生活也要过得一丝不苟，马马虎虎可不行迷！
t_en: That's how life should be lived too — steady and precise. No slacking, mem!

t_ch: 每当晚风吹拂风铃，叮铃叮铃声穿过林隙，回家的时间就到了迷。
t_en: When the evening wind stirs the chimes to life, their ting-a-ling drifts through the rustling forest leaves... That's the time to go home, mem.

t_ch: 不对，怎么是你敲的！
t_en: Wait, you rang it?

t_ch: 我也正纳闷呢。怎么刚到田地里，一天就已经过去了迷……
t_en: Huh, weird. I just stepped into the field, and the whole day's already gone, mem...

t_ch: 你也想参加舞会吗？
t_en: You wanna join the dance too?

t_ch: 只许用「徕」一个音符伴奏的舞会马上就要举行啦，敲风铃就当你报名了迷。
t_en: The "re"-only dance is starting soon. Ring the wind chime, and you're in, mem!

t_ch: 虽然暂时只有我们俩，但是这样一来，你也不用担心被抢走舞伴了迷！
t_en: Well, it's just the two of us for now. But hey, look at the bright side — no competition for dance partners, mem!

t_ch: 无论听多少遍都不会腻。
t_en: I could listen to it forever and never get bored.

t_ch: 不过，再不去送信就要迟到了迷！
t_en: Still... I better go deliver that letter, or I'll be late, mem!

t_ch: 明明走两步就能见面，大家为什么还要写信呢？真想不通迷……
t_en: But really — why write letters when you could just walk over and talk in person? Doesn't make sense, mem...

t_ch: 嘘，仔细听。
t_en: Shhh, listen closely.

t_ch: 是不是觉得身体被旋律洗涤，心灵轻盈地就要飞了起来？
t_en: Can you feel the melody washing over you? Like your soul's about to take flight?

t_ch: 这就是「咪」的魔力，我的生命和灵魂，统统都可以献给这个音迷～
t_en: That's the power of "mi." My life, my soul, all of it belongs to that one note, mem!

t_ch: 「咪」！最庄重、最神圣的音符！
t_en: "Mi"! The most solemn, the most sacred note of all!

t_ch: 听村长说，岁月为妖精揭晓的预言里，就是用这个音念诵我们的名字的迷！
t_en: The chief says that in the prophecy revealed to the fairies by Time, our names were chanted with this very note, mem!

t_ch: 迷路迷境已经许久未有人踏足了，你的到来，可让这森林热闹了不少哪！
t_en: The paths to Membrance Maze have long been forgotten. Your arrival has brought the forest back to life!

t_ch: 既然草叶和藤蔓敞开怀抱将你接纳，既然久远的歌谣指引你来到此处，我们也会把你视作贵客，一同围在篝火边，分享雨露、故事和欢笑。
t_en: Since the leaves and vines have opened wide to welcome you, since ancient songs have guided your steps — we too shall treat you as an honored guest. We'll gather 'round the fire and share the rain, the stories, and the laughter.

t_ch: 呵呵…到那时，记得给大家也讲讲自己的故事啊。
t_en: Hehe... when that day comes, don't forget to tell us your story, too.

t_ch: 怎样才能当上村长？
t_en: How did you become a village chief?

t_ch: 呵呵。那是很久以前的事了。那时嫩芽尚未长成参天大树，树桩中的年轮仍旧能够数清，迷境也不像这般拥挤。
t_en: Hehe... that was a long time ago. Back then, saplings had yet to stretch toward the sky. You could still count the rings inside a tree stump. And the Maze wasn't nearly as full as it is today.

t_ch: 最早来到这里的妖精，一些去了密林深处嬉游，一些一睡就不愿醒来。我呢，不知该去哪里，哪儿需要就去哪帮上一把。
t_en: The first fairies to arrive — some ran off to play in the deep woods. Some fell asleep and never wanted to wake up. As for me, I simply wandered to wherever help was needed.

t_ch: 不知过去了多久，村落渐渐越来越繁盛，也不知从哪天起，呵呵…孩子们便开始称呼我为「村长」了。
t_en: I don't know how long it's been. But little by little, the village grew more lively. And then, one day — hehe... the children just started calling me "Chief."

t_ch: 村长的职责是什么？
t_en: And what does a chief do?

t_ch: 呵呵，当村长，可不像你想象的那么容易。耕种、汲水都需要我来安排。妖精间起了争执，也得我来调解。
t_en: Hehe... being a chief isn't as easy as you think. Planting crops, drawing water — I have to handle it all. And when the fairies get into fights, I'm the one who has to break them up.

t_ch: 除此之外，还要向迷境深处祷告，聆听岁月的呼唤，解读它降下的预言。
t_en: Then there's the praying — to the heart of Maze. Listening to the whispers of time, interpreting the prophecies it leaves behind.

t_ch: 然后，还有等待。等待预言实现，等待命运真的降临我们身边——等待是最重要的工作哪。
t_en: And above all, there's the waiting. Waiting for the prophecy to come true. Waiting for fate to draw near. Waiting, you see, is the most important job of all.

t_ch: 下回再来探望你。
t_en: I'll see you next time.

t_ch: 一定要来，我们约好了。孩子们听了外面的故事，一定会高兴地直翘尾巴哪。
t_en: You have to! It's a promise. When the little ones hear your tales from the outside, they'll wag their tails with joy!

t_ch: 汤汁…溪涧源头的山泉。
t_en: Soup... drawn from spring water at the mountain's source.

t_ch: 泉水煮沸后沁人心脾的甘甜，恰到好处地和白白芋的甜香糅合在了一起迷。
t_en: Once boiled, its crisp sweetness blended perfectly with the scent of white taro, memi.

t_ch: 调味…地底深处的岩盐。
t_en: Seasoning... rock salt from deep beneath the earth.

t_ch: 只可惜盐粒过粗，火候也有所欠缺。汤浑浊不清，白白芋的口感也过硬了些迷。
t_en: But alas, the grains were too coarse, and the heat wasn't quite right. The soup turned murky, and the white taro came out a little too firm, memi.

t_ch: 迷？这是…好陌生的味道。
t_en: Mem? This taste... it's unfamiliar.

t_ch: 还有你尝不出来的吗？
t_en: Wait, you couldn't tell what it was?

t_ch: 我也听饿了。
t_en: Now you've made me hungry, too.

t_ch: 迷！任何人都不许质疑我专业的味蕾。菜里的每滴调料，我都能尝出来迷！
t_en: Memi! No one's allowed to question my professional palate! I can taste every single drop of seasoning in that stew, memi!

t_ch: 这是…屋檐上的灰尘。迷，为料理增添了几分岁月的沉淀。
t_en: This is... dust from the rooftop. Memi, a sprinkle of time's essence added to the stew.

t_ch: 这是…锄头柄的倒刺。迷，仿佛能感到收获的艰辛。
t_en: This is... a splinter from a hoe's handle. Memi, you can almost taste the toil of the harvest.

t_ch: 这是…妖精手背上的毛发。迷迷？
t_en: This is... hair from the back of a fairy's hand. Mem?

t_ch: 是谁在做菜前不洗手迷！
t_en: Who started cooking without washing their hands, memi?

t_ch: 太生气了，迷！我让妖精们间隔一段时间就给田地间浇些水，它们竟然说我异想天开。
t_en: I'm furious, memi! I told the fairies to water the fields regularly, and they called me a delusional dreamer!

t_ch: 为什么天空会下雨，为什么山泉会往下流，又为什么要把水洒进田地？
t_en: Why does the sky rain? Why do springs flow downhill? And why do we pour water into the fields?

t_ch: 那么多技艺都失去了传承，那么多学识都被我们忘记，那么多美妙的诗歌，都变成了毫无意义的「迷迷迷」！
t_en: So many crafts have been lost. So much knowledge forgotten. So many lovely poems have become nothing but meaningless notes of "Memi Memi Memi"!

t_ch: 想当年我到处闯荡时，看见过漫山遍野的麦田，每一株麦穗都有妖精的手掌那么大。
t_en: Back when I wandered far and wide, I saw wheat fields blanketing the hills — every ear of grain as big as a fairy's hand.

t_ch: 唉，我猜你肯定也没见过迷。
t_en: Alas... I bet you've never seen that either, memi.

t_ch: 你是怎么出去的？
t_en: How did you ever leave that place?

t_ch: 我早就忘记了。说不定我是搬家来迷境的，也说不定是在久远的梦里见过迷！
t_en: I've forgotten. Maybe I moved here. Or maybe... maybe I dreamed of the Maze long ago, memi.

t_ch: 唉，真是一代不如一代了迷。
t_en: Alas, every generation, worse than the last, memi.

t_ch: 都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！
t_en: Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, step right in, come and taste it, memi!

t_ch: 这位顾客您好，请问您要来点什么？
t_en: Welcome, dear guest! What would you like to order today?

t_ch: 刺刺球蜜饯、刺刺果酿、炉烤刺刺球派、刺刺沙拉、刺刺球果酱，我们这里应有尽有，请随意挑选迷~
t_en: Candied Quillorb Berries, Quillorb Fruit Brew, Oven-Baked Quillorb Berry Pie, Quillorb Salad, Quillorb Berry Jam — we've got it all, memi! Please, take your pick!

t_ch: 怎么全是刺刺球？
t_en: Why is it all Quillorbs?

t_ch: 刺刺球就刺刺球吧。
t_en: Quillorbs it is, then.

t_ch: 不好意思，其实连刺刺球都没有迷。我只是在练习餐厅服务员的礼仪。
t_en: Sorry, memi. Truth is, we don't even have any Quillorbs. I was just practicing my restaurant service lines.

t_ch: 虽然迷境里的餐厅荒废很久了，但我从小就梦想成为服务员迷。每天都能端着热乎乎的菜肴，吃不限量的员工餐，这一定是世界上最好的工作迷！
t_en: Even though the restaurants in the Maze have long been closed, I've always dreamed of being a server, memi! Carrying hot dishes fresh from the kitchen, unlimited staff meals every day — that must be the best job in the world, memi!

t_ch: 我、我甚至觉得自己就是为此而生的迷！
t_en: I—I even think I was born for it, memi!

t_ch: 但在此之前，必须勤加练习。
t_en: But before that... I need to practice, and practice hard.

t_ch: 「都来都来，都来看看迷！多来多来，多来尝尝迷！」
t_en: "Come one, come all! Take a look, memi! Step right up, come and try it, memi!"

t_ch: 迷！迷迷！抬起头，不要向干旱的天气弯腰。
t_en: Memi! Mem! Lift your head. Don't bow to the dry weather.

t_ch: 这段时间很难捱，但希望就在眼前，一定要坚持住迷！
t_en: Times are tough right now, but hope is just ahead. Hang in there, memi!

t_ch: 使出全力冲出泥巴，你们就能看到这个美丽的世界，还有我，一直守候在你们身边迷！
t_en: Push through the mud with everything you've got, and you'll see how beautiful the world is. And me, memi — I am right here, always waiting by your side!

t_ch: 你在和我说话？
t_en: Are you talking to me?

t_ch: 嘘！别吵，我在和种子们聊天迷。
t_en: Shh! Not so loud. I'm talking to the seeds, memi.

t_ch: 最近总不下雨，田地干巴巴的，种子也不发芽。所以我想给它们打气迷！
t_en: It hasn't rained in ages, the soil's gone dry, and the seeds won't sprout. So I'm cheering them on, memi!

t_ch: 加油——等你们结出果实，我一定会把你们做成整个迷境最美味的菜肴，一口不落地全吃下肚迷！
t_en: Hang in there! When you bear fruit, I'll turn you into the most delicious dish in the Maze — and eat every last bite, memi!

t_ch: 二十二颗蝉蜕，十五颗半鹅卵石，以及七枚花瓣。我的全部家产，四舍五入下能买下半个迷境迷。
t_en: Twenty-two cicada shells, fifteen and a half cobbles, and seven flower petals. That's my entire fortune — rounded up, I could buy half of the Maze, memi.

t_ch: 花瓣枯萎就不值钱了，但是我不在乎迷。你知道为什么吗？因为我有的是钱迷！
t_en: Wilted petals aren't worth much anymore, but I don't care, memi. You know why? Because I'm rich, memi!

t_ch: 那么，是怎么赚到的呢？
t_en: So how did you earn all that?

t_ch: 我也摸不着头脑迷。
t_en: I haven't the slightest clue, memi.

t_ch: 那天我刚想用花瓣换颗刺刺球吃，结果一阵风吹来，把花瓣吹进了小溪。
t_en: That day, I was just about to trade a petal for a Quillorb, when a gust of wind blew it into the stream.

t_ch: 我正迷迷地叹气，突然发现，脚边全是亮晶晶的鹅卵石！命运实在是太捉弄人了迷！我一气之下，就把它们都丢了出去迷。
t_en: I sighed a big Mem sigh. Then I looked down — and my feet were surrounded by shiny, glittery cobbles! Fate really is full of surprises, memi! I got so mad, I just tossed them all away, memi.

t_ch: 结果鹅卵石砸中树杈，蝉蜕像下雨一样哗啦啦落下来了迷。
t_en: Then the cobbles hit a tree branch, and the cicada shells came raining down like a summer storm, memi.

t_ch: 一下子什么都拥有了，好空虚迷。该用它们去换什么呢？
t_en: In an instant, I had everything. And it felt so empty, memi. What should I spend it all on?

t_ch: 买大餐，开宴会！
t_en: Buy a feast! Throw a banquet!

t_ch: 听得我肚子迷迷叫了迷！我也好想吃香喷喷的菜肴。
t_en: Now you've made my tummy rumble, memi! I wanna eat something warm and delicious too.

t_ch: 不过，就算悬赏一颗鹅卵石的重金，找遍整个迷境，恐怕也找不到一位合格的厨师迷……
t_en: But even if I offered a whole cobble as a reward, I doubt there's a single proper chef left in all the Maze, memi...

t_ch: 雇佣妖精，夺取剩余价值。
t_en: Hire fairies, extract surplus value.

t_ch: 那是什么迷？完全理解不了，但是听起来好可怕迷！
t_en: What's that, memi? I don't get it at all, but it sounds terrifying, memi!

t_ch: 不想和有钱妖精说话！
t_en: I don't want to talk to any rich fairies!

t_ch: 哼，我也很忙的迷。钱多得实在花不完，得忙着花迷！
t_en: Hmph! I'm super busy too, memi. I've got more money than I can spend, so I'm busy spending, memi!

t_ch: 新来的客人，欢迎迷！你也被我的舞蹈迷住，移不开眼睛了迷？
t_en: Hey there, new guest. Welcome, memi! Got your eyes stuck on my dance? Can't look away, huh, memi?

t_ch: 也难怪啦，这支舞我练习了好久，每个动作都刻在脑袋里了。
t_en: Well, no surprise! I've been practicing this routine forever. Every move is etched into my head!

t_ch: 对了迷，你有没有遇到过其他练舞的妖精？
t_en: By the way, memi, have you come across any other dancing fairies lately?

t_ch: 一靠近它们就溜走了。
t_en: They always run off the moment I get close.

t_ch: 还以为它们是身上痒。
t_en: I thought maybe they were just itchy.

t_ch: 哼哼，看来大家都想要偷偷练习，在舞会上惊艳所有人迷。
t_en: Hehe, looks like everyone's sneaking in some practice, all hoping to wow the crowd at the dance party, memi!

t_ch: 舞会马上就要开始，我也得准备亮相了，记得来支持我迷~
t_en: The dance is starting soon. I need to get ready to shine! Don't forget to come cheer for me, memi~

t_ch: 迷，新来的客人，你真的来参加舞会啦！
t_en: Memi! You really came to the dance, new guest!

t_ch: 这身打扮…你是打算扮演故事里的冷酷骑士吧？没准你也可以角逐舞会的桂冠呢~
t_en: That outfit... are you dressed as a cold, mysterious knight from a story? You might even win the dance crown yourself~

t_ch: 每次大树开始抽芽，我们就会举办新的舞会，然后采最鲜嫩的枝条做成桂冠，戴在最出色的舞者头上。
t_en: Every time the big tree sprouts new leaves, we host a new dance. We pluck the freshest twigs to weave into a crown for the finest dancer.

t_ch: 迷，偷偷告诉你，赢家能得到大树的祝福，实现一个心愿哦！
t_en: Memi, I'll let you in on a secret. The winner gets the big tree's blessing and one wish!

t_ch: 你想许什么愿？
t_en: What would you wish for?

t_ch: 往届的赢家都许了什么愿？
t_en: What have past winners wished for?

t_ch: 迷迷，身为舞者，许的愿望当然是——
t_en: Mem, as a dancer, the only wish worth making is—

t_ch: 「舞会能一直、一直办下去！」
t_en: "Let the dance go on forever and ever!"

t_ch: 好想知道海的那边是什么，可是我既不会驾船，也不会游泳嘤~
t_en: I really want to know what's beyond the sea, but I can't sail, and I can't swim, eep~

t_ch: 听说有一句开海辟路的祷言——
t_en: I heard there's a sea-splitting prayer—

t_ch: 「撕裂~形骸~解放~」
t_en: "Rending my form, setting free~"

t_ch: 我很厉害的嘤~只要有我在，小鸟们就不会来偷吃麦穗啦！
t_en: I'm amazing, eep~! As long as I'm here, no bird's gonna steal a single grain!

t_ch: 主要是稻草人的功劳。
t_en: That's mostly the scarecrow's doing.

t_ch: 在这放只奇美拉也行。
t_en: Could always toss a chimera in here too.

t_ch: 站…站在巨人的肩膀上，也是一种本事嘤！
t_en: Standing... standing on the shoulders of giants counts as being capable too, eep!

t_ch: 这位{F#少女}{M#少年}，我看你双眼炯炯有神，来玩个游戏吧！
t_en: You there, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, those eyes are shining bright! Let's play a game, shall we?

t_ch: 看看你的视线能否跟上我的速度嘤~
t_en: Let's see if your gaze can keep up with me, eep~

t_ch: 猜猜我在哪？
t_en: Can you guess where I am?

t_ch: 搜索较近的一堆。
t_en: Search the closer pile.

t_ch: 找到我啦！你的目光果然锐利，可不可以再陪我玩一次嘤~
t_en: You found me! Eagle eyes indeed! Wanna play again, eep?

t_ch: 搜索较远的一堆。
t_en: Search the farther pile.

t_ch: 答案错误，看来我的身影成功让你眼花缭乱了嘤！
t_en: Wrong guess! Looks like I really did dazzle your vision, eep!

t_ch: 静观其变。
t_en: Wait and see.

t_ch: 求你了，来猜吧！回应我嘤！
t_en: Come on, pleeease. Take a guess! Say something, eep!

t_ch: 听说每一批出去闯荡的孩子，都会在离开村庄前许下约定：等长大之后，一定要在这棵树前重聚。
t_en: I heard that every group of children who went out of the village would make a promise before leaving: When they grew up, they'd meet again before this tree.

t_ch: 有时他们会走上不同的道路，但友谊坚固如初，好像不受岁月磨损一样。
t_en: Sometimes, they would step on different paths, but their friendships remained as strong as ever, as if time could never wear them away.

t_ch: 时光流转，生生不息，我又何时才能等到我的那只虫呢……
t_en: Time passes and life circles. When will I find that dear friend of mine...

t_ch: 飞得越高，望得越远，整片麦田的景象尽收眼底——这都是农民伯伯们辛勤劳作的成果嘤。
t_en: The higher you soar, the farther you see. From up here, you can take in the whole wheat field — all the fruits of the farmers' hard work, eep.

t_ch: 我真希望自己有羽毛和翅膀，像麦垛上的布谷鸟一样……
t_en: I wish I had feathers and wings, like the cuckoo that perches on the haystack...

t_ch: 不对，我好像确实有翅膀嘤！
t_en: Wait — don't I already have wings, eep!?

t_ch: 吓…吓我一跳！还好人家会飞，不然就要掉下去了嘤！
t_en: Y—you scared me! Good thing I can fly, or I'd have fallen, eep!

t_ch: 每次飞过远方的麦田，看着农民伯伯们辛勤劳作，人家就不由得去想……
t_en: Every time I glide over the wheat fields and watch the farmers toiling away. I can't help but think...

t_ch: 要是有能自动播种的魔法就好了嘤。
t_en: Wouldn't it be wonderful if there were magic that could plant seeds all on its own, eep.

t_ch: 看到那边的石堆了嘛？是我的杰作嘤~
t_en: See that stack of stones over there? That's my masterpiece, eep~

t_ch: 只要保持平衡，就能把大石块垒在小石块上……
t_en: As long as you keep your balance, you can pile the big stones right on top of the small ones...

t_ch: ——你不要戳它嘤！
t_en: —Hey, don't poke it, eep!

t_ch: 你是否好奇，晒不到太阳的树洞里为什么会有关于太阳的壁画呢？
t_en: Ever wonder why there's a mural of the sun inside a tree hollow where no sunlight reaches?

t_ch: 我也想不明白，也许是景观计划的一部分嘤~
t_en: I don't get it either. Maybe it's part of a landscape design, eep~

t_ch: 多漂亮的小木屋呀，好想进去看看嘤！
t_en: What a lovely little cabin. I really want to take a peek inside, eep!

t_ch: 是我敲门的声音太轻了，还是屋主人不在家？
t_en: Was I too soft when I knocked? Or maybe the owner isn't home?

t_ch: 总之只好下一个门扉时再来拜访嘤~
t_en: Oh well, I'll visit again at the next Entry Hour, eep!

t_ch: 对不起，这里已经满员了嘤！
t_en: Sorry, we're full here, eep!

t_ch: 明明只有你一个呀！
t_en: But you're the only one here!

t_ch: 桌上不是很宽敞嘛？
t_en: And that table's plenty big!

t_ch: 好吧，只要你把我拉起来，我就把桌子让给你。
t_en: Fine, pull me up and the table's yours!

t_ch: 这就是我的起床路线嘤！
t_en: This is how I wake up every day!

t_ch: 你循着先前听到的异响，用力将声音的源头从地里拽了出来。
t_en: Curious about the strange noise, you firmly tug its source right out of the ground.

t_ch: 喂，你这家伙，收获月还没到，为什么要把我拔出来嘤？
t_en: Hey! What's the big idea? The Month of Reaping isn't here yet!

t_ch: 看到那片菜地了吗？只要像萝卜一样在地里待够时间，我就能变成很多个我啦！
t_en: See that vegetable garden? If I stay buried long enough like a radish, I'll sprout into many copies of myself!

t_ch: 萝卜可不会闪闪发光。
t_en: But radishes don't glow like you do.

t_ch: 萝卜可不会开口说话。
t_en: And radishes certainly don't talk.

t_ch: 哼，现在说什么也来不及了。我要备战下一个耕耘月了嘤！
t_en: Hmph, say what you will! I need to prepare for the upcoming Month of Cultivation!

t_ch: 种瓜得瓜，种豆得豆，种萤得萤，嘤……
t_en: You reap what you sow~ Whether it's melons, beans, or fireflies... *sob*

t_ch: 开！
t_en: Open!

t_ch: 都别过来…
t_en: All of you, stay back...

t_ch: 一步，两步~
t_en: One step, two steps~

t_ch: 还有多久？
t_en: Are we there yet?

t_ch: 好高好高~
t_en: Flying higher and higher~

t_ch: 就这样，不要动…
t_en: Perfect, don't move...

t_ch: 还有个太阳~
t_en: There's a sun too~

t_ch: 有人在吗？
t_en: Hello? Anybody here?

t_ch: 不想动弹…
t_en: So comfy, don't wanna move...

t_ch: 种萤得萤…
t_en: You reap what you sow...

t_ch: 我其实想荡秋千…
t_en: I actually wanted to try the swing...

t_ch: 可惜秋千太小了！
t_en: But it's way too small!

t_ch: 铃铃铃~
t_en: Ring, ring, ring~

t_ch: 这只若虫努力地提着风铃，试图给出某种提示——希望它不会感到疲惫。
t_en: The nymph is trying its best to lift the chime. Looks like it's trying to tell you something. Hope it doesn't get too tired.

t_ch: 是你呀，贵客…我们又见面了。
t_en: Well hello, my esteemed guest... we meet again.

t_ch: 我一定在做梦。
t_en: This has to be a dream.

t_ch: 某种程度上，你说得没错。因你活跃的思想，我才得以在此出现。
t_en: In a way, you're right. I exist here thanks to your active imagination.

t_ch: 你来自新世界？
t_en: Are you from the new world?

t_ch: 或许情况并非如此。相较于外部世界，我与你的关系更为密切。
t_en: I don't believe so. My connection to you is more intimate than to the outside world.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭的环境似乎受某种特殊力量影响，将我从你的记忆中塑型，称其为魔法也不为过。
t_en: Aedes Elysiae is influenced by a unique power that molds me from your memories — magic, one might say.

t_ch: 与此身躯一并继承的，还有感知织者的能力，以及搜集若虫的使命。想必贵客对我往昔的作用印象深刻。
t_en: In this form, I inherit the ability to sense weavers and the duty to collect nymphs. I'm sure you recall my former purpose.

t_ch: 无论如何，感谢你一直以来的协助。若发现若虫，仍请拨冗相助。
t_en: Regardless, thank you for your continued assistance. If you find any nymphs, please lend a hand.

t_ch: 又见面了，贵客。
t_en: We meet again, my esteemed guest.

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 贵客若能提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>，我 可将其化作记忆中的金丝去寻找若虫。
t_en: Provide me with <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>, and I'll weave them into golden threads to track down the nymphs.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠一把抓过记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者望洋兴叹。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>海滨码头</color>极目远眺，思索着渡海的通径呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who longs for distant shores. My golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the coastal dock</color>, staring across the waters, dreaming of passage to the other side.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者满腔热忱。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>麦田边的稻草人上</color>，守护着耕耘的果实呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is filled with passion. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a scarecrow next to the wheat field</color>, watching over the fruits of cultivation.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者擅长借助环境掩蔽身形。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>屋旁的麦垛中</color>，期待与行人的视线较量一番。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who excels at blending in with their surroundings. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>a stack of wheat next to the house</color>, waiting to make eye contact with passers-by.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者感伤于岁月变迁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>秋千旁的大树下</color>，与跨越时间的童梦为伴。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who laments the changes along the river of time. The golden thread brings tidings: They are under <color=#dbc291ff>a tree next to a swing</color>, enjoying a childhood dream that transcends time.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者向往更高的天际。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院二楼的窗台外面</color>，俯瞰麦田的景色呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of soaring to greater heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>outside a window on the second floor of the Sacrament Courtyard</color>, admiring the wheat fields from above.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者专注于保持平衡的艺术。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>石堆旁的花丛中</color>，欣赏着自己的作品呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is trying to perfect the art of balancing. The golden thread brings tidings: They are in <color=#dbc291ff>a flowerbed next to a pile of stones</color>, admiring its own creation.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者被妖精的景观装饰吸引。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>画着太阳的石壁前</color>，琢磨壁画的含义呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is attracted by the fairy's scenic decorations. The golden threads bring tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a stone wall with a drawing of a sun</color>, pondering the meaning behind the mural.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者好奇妖精居所的内部结构。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>带有梯子的树屋门前</color>，想要参观拜访呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is curious about the interior construct of the fairy's residence. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a door to a treehouse with a flight of stairs</color>, hoping to pay a visit.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者率真随性。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>覆着叶片的餐桌上</color>，懒洋洋地休息呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is laid-back and free-spirited. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a dinner table strewn with leaves</color>, lounging languidly.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者模仿妖精的耕种动作。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>紧邻田地的道路一侧</color>，静候收获月的成果呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who imitates how the fairy farms. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hiding at <color=#dbc291ff>a side of a pathway right next to the crop field</color>, patiently waiting for the harvest in the Month of Reaping.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: Nope~

t_ch: 请谅解，贵客。我需要更多与记忆相关的力量，来增强自身感知若虫的能力。
t_en: Please understand, my esteemed guest. I need more power associated with memories to heighten my sensitivity to nymphs.

t_ch: 遗忘远比铭记困难。当前所追踪的若虫正占据着我的思绪，还是优先将其唤回吧。
t_en: Forgetting is far more challenging than remembering. My mind is consumed with the nymph I'm currently tracking. Let's focus on recalling it first.

t_ch: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
t_en: I've found all the nymphs here.

t_ch: 感谢你所做的贡献，贵客。如此多的织者嘤鸣，令我想起众多预言中的一则。
t_en: Thank you for your dedicated work, my esteemed guest. The symphony of weaver chirps reminds me of a special prophecy.

t_ch: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
t_en: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

t_ch: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
t_en: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

t_ch: 「乐章演奏的最高潮处。」嗯…哀丽秘榭的妖精一族喜爱音乐，善于演奏竖琴，以其乐声来营造载歌载舞的氛围。
t_en: "At the climax of the symphony." Hmm... The fairies of Aedes Elysiae have a passion for music, excel at playing harps, and use their melodies to create a festive atmosphere.

t_ch: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
t_en: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

t_ch: 预言中还提到「风铃」和旋律，也许与这只勾着风铃的若虫相关。
t_en: The prophecy mentions a "wind chime" and melody too. Perhaps it's related to this nymph carrying a wind chime.

t_ch: 恭喜，贵客。你走在时间的前沿，完成了预言的试炼。
t_en: Congratulations, my esteemed guest. You've ventured to the frontier of time and completed the prophesied trials.

t_ch: 预言不过是被遗忘的记述，一经自我实现，就会成为记忆的一部分。
t_en: Prophecies are simply forgotten chronicles that, once fulfilled by one's own actions, become embedded in memory.

t_ch: 能多给我点提示吗？
t_en: Can you give me more hints?

t_ch: 「乐章演奏的最高潮处。」嗯…哀丽秘榭的妖精一族喜爱音乐，善于演奏竖琴，以其乐声来营造载歌载舞的氛围。
t_en: "At the climax of the symphony." Hmm... The fairies of Aedes Elysiae have a passion for music, excel at playing harps, and use their melodies to create a festive atmosphere.

t_ch: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
t_en: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

t_ch: 预言中还提到「风铃」和旋律，也许与这只勾着风铃的若虫相关。
t_en: The prophecy mentions a "wind chime" and melody too. Perhaps it's related to this nymph carrying a wind chime.

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_ch: 记忆永不落幕，贵客，我会在此守候。
t_en: The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest. I will remain here, waiting.

t_ch: 记忆永不落幕，贵客。
t_en: The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest.

t_ch: 有的若虫是真BUG啊！
t_en: Some of those nymphs really are bugs!

t_ch: 这个嘛，作为往昔记忆的载体，若虫很容易受到混乱信息的影响：穿墙、闪烁、卡顿、原地不动…相信你已经在它们身上见到了许多异象。
t_en: Well, nymphs are basically vessels of old memories, so they're very prone to glitches: phasing through walls, blinking around, lagging, freezing in place... I'm sure you've seen plenty of weirdness from them.

t_ch: 我也曾试图干涉它们的行为，可惜这些异象无法稳定复现，我难以定位问题的具体所在……
t_en: I did try to fix their behavior, but those glitches are so random I couldn't even pinpoint the source...

t_ch: 但我相信，随着再创世的降临，一切都将变得简洁有序，若虫们的行为也不会那么「BUG」了。
t_en: Still, I believe that with Era Nova's arrival, everything will become clean and orderly again. Even the nymphs will stop being so "buggy."

t_ch: 石板怎么变成苹果了？
t_en: How did the stone tablet turn into an apple?

t_ch: 嗯…请见谅，贵客。这件物品并不在我的数据库中，我不敢轻易做出解读。
t_en: Hmm... forgive me, honored guest. This item isn't in my database, and I dare not interpret it without more information.

t_ch: 为了长久地保存信息，人们会把字刻在石头上——「颂言石板」便是凭此将预言传递至千年之后。
t_en: To preserve knowledge for generations, people carved words into stone — the Hymn Tablet carried prophecies across a thousand years this way.

t_ch: 但你手中之物…给我的感觉完全不同。我只在最古老的英雄史诗中见到过相似的表述。
t_en: But the thing you're holding... feels completely different. I've only seen descriptions like this in the oldest heroic epics.

t_ch: 你一定是经历了一场难以想象的冒险，才能够得到它吧。或许在未来的某个时刻，它会起到重要作用也说不定。
t_en: You must've gone through a tough adventure to get your hands on it. Who knows? Perhaps one day, it'll prove to be vital.

t_ch: 昔涟发出均匀的呼吸声，看上去睡得正沉。
t_en: Cyrene's steady breathing suggests she's sleeping soundly.

t_ch: 叫醒她。
t_en: Wake her up.

t_ch: 等她醒。
t_en: Wait until she wakes.

t_ch: 呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
t_en: Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!

t_ch: 趴在桌子上休息时，远远就瞟见{NICKNAME}过来啦，和记忆中一样干劲满满呢。
t_en: I was just resting on the table when I spotted {NICKNAME} coming from afar. Still bubbling with energy, just like in my memories!

t_ch: 趴在桌子上休息时，远远就瞟见{NICKNAME}过来啦，和记忆中一样从容不迫呢。
t_en: I was just resting on the table when I spotted {NICKNAME} coming from afar. Still so cool and composed, just like in my memories!

t_ch: 那，要做些什么好呢？
t_en: Well then, what should we do next?

t_ch: 想做些有意义的事。
t_en: I want to do something meaningful.

t_ch: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性些，四处看看吧？
t_en: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and see where spontaneity leads us?

t_ch: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
t_en: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

t_ch: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游，好吗？
t_en: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

t_ch: 没问题。闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
t_en: Absolutely. And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

t_ch: 暂时不想做什么……
t_en: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

t_ch: 好呀。人家会一直待在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
t_en: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 昔涟发出均匀的呼吸声，看上去睡得正沉。
t_en: Cyrene's steady breathing suggests she's sleeping soundly.

t_ch: 叫醒她。
t_en: Wake her up.
